How to use the color picker

Click the color selector, choose your color, and instantly see the HEX, RGB and HSL values. Click Copy to copy any format.

What is HEX, RGB and HSL?

HEX is used in web design and CSS. RGB stands for Red, Green, Blue. HSL stands for Hue, Saturation, Lightness.

Is this tool free?

Yes. Completely free, no login required. Everything runs in your browser.

⚡ PixMidas

Free browser-based tools. No login required. Runs locally in your browser.
